title: Why the EU Cyber Resilience Act Is the Most Important Regulation Taiwan Manufacturers Have Never Heard Of
summary: The CRA creates a hard shipment-blocking deadline for any connected product sold in the EU. For Taiwan's industrial exporters, the clock is already ticking. Here's what you need to know.

title: Built In, Not Bolted On: Why Embedded Cybersecurity Changes Everything for OT Products
summary: Compliance frameworks increasingly demand that security be designed into products from day one — not added as an afterthought. What this means for Taiwan's automation and EV charging manufacturers.
